nodes.label: AI as time-saving research assistant for complex multi-team topics
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable hallucinator requiring double-checking
nodes.grounding_span: The LLM is good at summarizing the different discussions which saves time

nodes.label: AI as generator of novel valuable references
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole source of information without verification
nodes.grounding_span: I will look at the response from the LLM but then go through the list of references it provides for more complete information

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: AI untrustworthiness due to hallucination experience
nodes.grounding_span: I found one instance where the information it returned was wrong. That was frustrating and I still remember that

nodes.label: AI use as habitual practice
nodes.label_negative: AI as novel tool for unfamiliar tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have not yet used AI to help with drafting presentations or data analysis yet. I am just in habit of doing those myself

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to job roles like data analysts
nodes.grounding_span: In the long run I'm sure AI can make things more efficient which will result in less need for data analysts

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: saves time over me going through each group discussion

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: it hallucinated an answer so it still needs to be double-checked

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: it's up to us individually to work on our skills

nodes.label: Strategic escalation from simple to complex tasks
